page.title: Future Simple: Negatives
page.subtitle_html: Future Simple: Negatives — will not / won't + V1 для заперечень у майбутньому.

blocks.body: {"level":"A1–A2","intro":"У запереченнях Future Simple використовуємо will not або won't + V1.","rules":[{"label":"will not / won't","color":"emerald","text":"Повна і коротка форми мають однакове значення.","example":"I will not wait. / I won't wait."},{"label":"V1 after won't","color":"blue","text":"Після won't став базову форму без to.","example":"She won't be late. / They won't come."},{"label":"Same for all subjects","color":"amber","text":"Форма won't не змінюється залежно від підмета.","example":"He won't call. / We won't call."}]}

{"title":"1. Базові моделі","intro":"Після will not / won't завжди використовуй V1.","items":[{"label":"Full form","title":"will not + V1","subtitle":"I will not forget. / She will not agree."},{"label":"Short form","title":"won't + V1","subtitle":"We won't be late. / They won't stay."},{"label":"Verb be","title":"won't be","subtitle":"It won't be difficult."},{"label":"Contrast","title":"will come → won't come","subtitle":"The main verb remains unchanged."}]}

{"title":"2. Ствердження і заперечення","intro":"Порівняй позитивну та негативну моделі.","rows":[{"en":"I will call tomorrow.","ua":"I won't call tomorrow.","note":"will → won't"},{"en":"She will be late.","ua":"She won't be late.","note":"won't be"},{"en":"They will come with us.","ua":"They won't come with us.","note":"same V1"}],"warning":"Не кажи will don't, won't to go або won't goes."}

{"title":"3. Типові помилки","items":[{"label":"Помилка 1","color":"rose","title":"Використовувати don't після will.","wrong":"❌ I will don't go.","right":"✅ I won't go."},{"label":"Помилка 2","color":"amber","title":"Додавати to після won't.","wrong":"❌ She won't to come.","right":"✅ She won't come."},{"label":"Помилка 3","color":"sky","title":"Змінювати основне дієслово.","wrong":"❌ He won't works.","right":"✅ He won't work."}]}

{"title":"4. Короткий підсумок","items":["Заперечення = subject + will not / won't + V1.","Won't однакове для всіх підметів.","Після won't не став to і не змінюй дієслово.","Для дієслова be використовуй won't be."]}

{"title":"5. Практика","select_title":"Вправа 1. Обери правильне заперечення","select_intro":"Обери правильну форму Future Simple.","selects":[{"label":"a) He won't come. / b) He won't comes.","prompt":"Який варіант правильний?","answer":"a"},{"label":"a) We will don't wait. / b) We won't wait.","prompt":"Який варіант правильний?","answer":"b"}],"options":["a","b"],"input_title":"Вправа 2. Зроби речення заперечним","input_intro":"Перепиши речення з won't.","inputs":[{"before":"She will be late.","after":"→","answer":"She won't be late.","accepted":["She won't be late.","She will not be late."]},{"before":"They will stay here.","after":"→","answer":"They won't stay here.","accepted":["They won't stay here.","They will not stay here."]}]}

{"title":"Уроки Future Simple","items":[{"label":"Forms and Use","url":"/theory/future-simple/future-simple-forms","current":false},{"label":"Negatives","url":"/theory/future-simple/future-simple-negatives","current":true},{"label":"Questions and Short Answers","url":"/theory/future-simple/future-simple-questions","current":false},{"label":"Time Expressions","url":"/theory/future-simple/future-simple-time-expressions","current":false},{"label":"Will vs Be Going To","url":"/theory/future-simple/will-vs-be-going-to","current":false}]}
